hooks.command: ./bin/mindspec record health 2>/dev/null; ./bin/mindspec instruct 2>/dev/null || echo 'mindspec instruct unavailable — run make build'

state=$(cat .mindspec/state.json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.mode // empty'); if [ "$state" = "plan" ]; then echo 'MindSpec plan mode is active. Do NOT exit plan mode directly. Run /plan-approve to validate the plan, create beads, and transition to implementation.' >&2; exit 2; fi

state=$(cat .mindspec/state.json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.mode // empty'); if [ "$state" = "plan" ]; then echo '{"additionalContext": "MindSpec plan mode is active. Write your plan to docs/specs/*/plan.md. When complete, use /plan-approve — do NOT use ExitPlanMode directly."}'; fi
